one_time_description: Government of Canada forgiveness of treaty negotiation loan of $1,197,778 per 2019 federal budget
economic_notes: Nation has significant real estate development interests through MST limited partnerships including Jericho lands. Committed to future principal payments of $13.8M (Nov 2021), $18.63M (Nov 2022), and ~$105.57M (Nov 2023) for Provincial Jericho lands. Squamish Nation Trust holds $92.5M settlement from Canada (2000). Multiple commercial enterprises including marinas, gas station, forestry, RV park.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Auditor changed from prior year auditor to PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. Nation has complex consolidation including proportionate consolidation of Spo7ez (50%) and MST Development Corporation (33%), plus 8 government business enterprises/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Squamish Nation Trust ($92.5M settlement fund) is NOT consolidated. Large MST (Jericho 2016) LP equity loss of $4.791M due to IFRS fair value adjustments on loans. $16.6M loan from Squamish Nation Trust secured against Capilano IR No. 5 land was due July 2020 and being renegotiated. Treaty negotiation loan of $1.197M forgiven by federal government. Remuneration schedule was cut off in the provided text. Expenses by program not separately disclosed in segments; only expenses by object available. Total expenses by object ($79,595,317) differs from statement total ($80,578,330) - difference due to equity losses treatment. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding only as other government transfers not separately identified.
